致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方由week 3起將zoom meeting 全部轉為video and live learning，以及取消take attendance嘅做法。
理由一:
zoom meeting令到學生無法投入於課堂，上課氣氛十分尷尬，令到老師教學節奏減慢
例子: 同學在開cam或mic後感到極不自在，老師問問題後經常dead air，而老師亦不習慣如此教學模式。
理由二:
zoom meeting沒有錄影，同學無法重溫上堂嘅內容。當有lag或斷線嘅情況，同學需要要求老師重複內容，或直接miss咗。
理由三:
同學家中並沒有合適嘅環境以及設備上堂。受新型冠狀病毒的影響，同學大部分時間都在家中上課，但部份同學家中過於嘈吵，或有工程進行中，都大大影響上課時嘅進度。
理由四：
現在社會環境惡劣，因同學們有機會外出購買生活用品，例如口罩，廁紙等，未必不能夠在特定準時上課，再者online learning嘅目的在於flexible，因此校方應取消Take attendance嘅做法。
取代方案:
一、將所有zoom meeting改為live learning or video learning(包括使用Panopto)，讓同學能夠重溫課堂內容。
二、將zoom meeting改為不開cam，不開mic嘅形式，並要求老師錄製課堂內容。
三、取消Take attendance嘅分數，例如將10%平分於其他計分項目，或直接以90%作為總分

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅意見，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

一眾___大學學生、教職員及畢業生

*此聲明不代表____大學校方及沒有參與聯署的____大學學生、校友及職員之立場。
Push

Dear ,

We are writing to complain about the use of Zoom Meeting for online learning and the section of taking attendance during online learning in Zoom Meeting. We now request the University of __________ for turning all zoom meeting lesson into video and live learning and cancel out the taking attendance section.

Reason One:
When students are having live lesson on Zoom Meeting and turn on their mic and camera, they feel so embarrassed and uncomfortable. It makes them unable to enjoy and focus on the lesson. Also, it may slow down the teaching efficiency of professors and tutors. For example, there are always some "dead air" after the questions asked by teachers.

Reason Two:
There are no recordings and videos after the lesson. When the internet disconnects, students may easily miss out some important information from teachers. Students also cannot revise the content of the lectures and tutorial.

Reason Three:
Because of the impacts of Novel coronavirus, students usually have the meeting at home. However, most of them usually do not have a suitable learning environment and equipment. For example, some may be under a noisy environment.

Reason Four:
The aim of online learning is to allow students to follow up the missing lectures and tutorials. Being flexible is extremely essential. However, under nowadays society's condition, students sometimes have to go outside to buy some necessities such as surgical masks and toilet papers. They may not able to follow the original time session having the lesson online. Therefore, the university should cancel out the attendance taking section.

Alternative 1:
To turn all zoom meeting sections into live learning or video learning, including Panopto. It allows students to revise the lectures and tutorials.

Alternative 2:
To make sure all zoom meeting do not require students to turn on their camera and microphones and require teachers to record the lesson.

Alternative 3:

To cancel out the section of taking attendance.

We hope that the University of __________ will accept our suggestion and understand our concern.
Best Regards,
_____ Students,Staff and Alumni members


Disclaimer: This open letter does not represent the stance of the University and other ____ students, alumni, and staff who have not signed this letter.

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方改善zoom meeting的上課模式，以及取消網上點名嘅做法。

方案一：
要求教師們把課堂內容錄製成影片，並把強制開啟視像和麥克風改為非強制性，老師們需在教學期間把全部同學設至靜音，在答題期間或同學有發問時才解除靜音。

理由一：把課堂內容錄製成影片可讓同學重溫和複習，當遇上不明白的地方也可以重看，大大提升同學們的學習效率。
理由二：並不是每位同學都擁有合適的環境上課，雖則有虛擬背景和靜音兩個方法，但未能完全保護同學們的個人私隱。再者設至靜音能夠避免上課的時候不被打擾。

方案二：
取消網上點名的形式

理由一：由於社會環境的影響，同學們或會在原定的上課時間外出，例如購買生活用品，而取消點名的形式能夠令網上學習更為彈性。

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅建議，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

一眾___大學學生、教職員及畢業生

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方由week 3起將zoom meeting 全部轉為video and live learning，以及取消take attendance嘅做法。
理由一:
zoom meeting令到學生無法投入於課堂，上課氣氛十分尷尬，令到老師教學節奏減慢
例子: 同學在開cam或mic後感到極不自在，老師問問題後經常dead air，而老師亦不習慣如此教學模式。
理由二:
zoom meeting沒有錄影，同學無法重溫上堂嘅內容。當有lag或斷線嘅情況，同學需要要求老師重複內容，或直接miss咗。
理由三:
同學家中並沒有合適嘅環境以及設備上堂。受新型冠狀病毒的影響，同學大部分時間都在家中上課，但部份同學家中過於嘈吵，或有工程進行中，都大大影響上課時嘅進度。
理由四：
現在社會環境惡劣，因同學們有機會外出購買生活用品，例如口罩，廁紙等，未必不能夠在特定準時上課，再者online learning嘅目的在於flexible，因此校方應取消Take attendance嘅做法。
取代方案:
一、將所有zoom meeting改為live learning or video learning(包括使用Panopto)，讓同學能夠重溫課堂內容。
二、將zoom meeting改為不開cam，不開mic嘅形式，並要求老師錄製課堂內容。
三、取消Take attendance嘅分數，例如將10%平分於其他計分項目，或直接以90%作為總分

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅意見，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

Dear _____

We are writing to complain about the use of Zoom for online learning and attendance-taking in Zoom. We believe there is an arrangement far better and more effectual than the current one, that is, to replace Zoom with online livestream lectures as well as lecture recordings.

Reason One:
When students are having live lessons, or “lectures” if you like, on Zoom, they often have to turn on their microphones and cameras, it made the whole experience quite an embarrassing one for both the students and the lecturer. It does not take a university vice-chancellor to understand why having one’s face up there on everyone’s laptop screens makes people uncomfortable. Consequently, the embarrassment made it difficult to enjoy, focus and by extension, understand the content. The awkward silence following questions asked by lecturers and tutors is also even more uncomfortably long than in conventional lectures.
More importantly, it invades one’s privacy and could tarnish one’s reputation. Students from financially incompetent families have to share a room with their siblings, actually let me rephrase, they might not even have a room. The cameras have exposed their family issues and financial situation to people they do not even talk to that much, not to mention the fact that if a student is connecting to a video call in a noisy living room, it hinders other student from learning in a conducive environment as well. It deeply troubles us that the university is so insensitive to an actual human being’s mental health and privacy.

We are writing to complain about the use of Zoom for online learning and attendance-taking in Zoom. We believe there is an arrangement far better and more effectual than the current one, that is, to replace Zoom with online livestream lectures as well as lecture recordings.

Reason One:
When students are having live lessons, or “lectures” if you like, on Zoom, they often have to turn on their microphones and cameras, it made the whole experience quite an embarrassing one for both the students and the lecturer. It does not take a university vice-chancellor to understand why having one’s face up there on everyone’s laptop screens makes people uncomfortable. Consequently, the embarrassment made it difficult to enjoy, focus and by extension, understand the content. The awkward silence following questions asked by lecturers and tutors is also even more uncomfortably long than in conventional lectures.
More importantly, it invades one’s privacy and could tarnish one’s reputation. Students from financially incompetent families have to share a room with their siblings, actually let me rephrase, they might not even have a room. The cameras have exposed their family issues and financial situation to people they do not even talk to that much, not to mention the fact that if a student is connecting to a video call in a noisy living room, it hinders other student from learning in a conducive environment as well. It deeply troubles us that the university is so insensitive to an actual human being’s mental health and privacy.

replies.msg:
Reason Two:
There are no lecture recordings not even audio ones after the lesson. Internet stability is subject to a lot of factors and is very contingent. Very often students miss out on different important information. We could ask the teaching staff to repeat but if everyone does that that would be very time-consuming. Moreover, in cases where the internet is too bad to even hear a complete sentence and it does not look like it is going to go back to normal any time soon, it might be impractical to ask the lecturer to repeat.

Nonetheless, it would really help to have recordings.

The university might reply by saying that it is the students’ responsibility to ensure internet stability. To that, we put forward two points. First, sometimes the internet issue is on the lecturers’ side. Second, it is also the university’s responsibility to provide quality and user-friendly teaching, even at unusual circumstances. We understand the university is unable to provide us with facilities but I assume lecture recordings, something popular among the academia, is not too much to ask from.

Reason Three:
The aim of online learning is to allow students to catch up on lectures and tutorials. Flexibility is of paramount importance. Taking the social atmosphere into consideration, students have no choice but to go outside for daily necessities such as surgical masks and toilet paper. Regrettably, to follow the timetable strictly would be impractical. Therefore, attendance-taking is honestly a rather suboptimal arrangement. Students have been understanding with the university in difficult times and we sincerely hope the university can return the favour.

quote.msg:
Dear _____

We are writing to complain about the use of Zoom for online learning and attendance-taking in Zoom. We believe there is an arrangement far better and more effectual than the current one, that is, to replace Zoom with online livestream lectures as well as lecture recordings.

Reason One:
When students are having live lessons, or “lectures” if you like, on Zoom, they often have to turn on their microphones and cameras, it made the whole experience quite an embarrassing one for both the students and the lecturer. It does not take a university vice-chancellor to understand why having one’s face up there on everyone’s laptop screens makes people uncomfortable. Consequently, the embarrassment made it difficult to enjoy, focus and by extension, understand the content. The awkward silence following questions asked by lecturers and tutors is also even more uncomfortably long than in conventional lectures.
More importantly, it invades one’s privacy and could tarnish one’s reputation. Students from financially incompetent families have to share a room with their siblings, actually let me rephrase, they might not even have a room. The cameras have exposed their family issues and financial situation to people they do not even talk to that much, not to mention the fact that if a student is connecting to a video call in a noisy living room, it hinders other student from learning in a conducive environment as well. It deeply troubles us that the university is so insensitive to an actual human being’s mental health and privacy.

Reason Two:
There are no lecture recordings not even audio ones after the lesson. Internet stability is subject to a lot of factors and is very contingent. Very often students miss out on different important information. We could ask the teaching staff to repeat but if everyone does that that would be very time-consuming. Moreover, in cases where the internet is too bad to even hear a complete sentence and it does not look like it is going to go back to normal any time soon, it might be impractical to ask the lecturer to repeat.

Nonetheless, it would really help to have recordings.

The university might reply by saying that it is the students’ responsibility to ensure internet stability. To that, we put forward two points. First, sometimes the internet issue is on the lecturers’ side. Second, it is also the university’s responsibility to provide quality and user-friendly teaching, even at unusual circumstances. We understand the university is unable to provide us with facilities but I assume lecture recordings, something popular among the academia, is not too much to ask from.

Reason Three:
The aim of online learning is to allow students to catch up on lectures and tutorials. Flexibility is of paramount importance. Taking the social atmosphere into consideration, students have no choice but to go outside for daily necessities such as surgical masks and toilet paper. Regrettably, to follow the timetable strictly would be impractical. Therefore, attendance-taking is honestly a rather suboptimal arrangement. Students have been understanding with the university in difficult times and we sincerely hope the university can return the favour.

Suggestion 1:
To turn all Zoom video conferences into livestream video learning with video recordings using platforms like Panopto. It allows students to revisit lectures and tutorials.

Suggestion 2:
To make sure all online classes do not require students to turn on their camera and microphones and to make lecture recordings mandatory for all teaching staff.

Suggestion 3:
To cancel attendance-taking.

We hope that the University of __________ will now have a better understanding of the cons of the current arrangement. We have provided a few suggestions. Should the university reject our requests, please present us with better solutions.

Best Regards,
_____ students, staff and alumni


Disclaimer: This open letter does not represent the stance of other ____ students, alumni, and staff who have not signed the letter.

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方由week 3起將zoom meeting 全部轉為video and live learning，以及取消take attendance嘅做法。
理由一:
zoom meeting令到學生無法投入於課堂，上課氣氛十分尷尬，令到老師教學節奏減慢
例子: 同學在開cam或mic後感到極不自在，老師問問題後經常dead air，而老師亦不習慣如此教學模式。
理由二:
zoom meeting沒有錄影，同學無法重溫上堂嘅內容。當有lag或斷線嘅情況，同學需要要求老師重複內容，或直接miss咗。
理由三:
同學家中並沒有合適嘅環境以及設備上堂。受新型冠狀病毒的影響，同學大部分時間都在家中上課，但部份同學家中過於嘈吵，或有工程進行中，都大大影響上課時嘅進度。
理由四：
現在社會環境惡劣，因同學們有機會外出購買生活用品，例如口罩，廁紙等，未必不能夠在特定準時上課，再者online learning嘅目的在於flexible，因此校方應取消Take attendance嘅做法。
取代方案:
一、將所有zoom meeting改為live learning or video learning(包括使用Panopto)，讓同學能夠重溫課堂內容。
二、將zoom meeting改為不開cam，不開mic嘅形式，並要求老師錄製課堂內容。
三、取消Take attendance嘅分數，例如將10%平分於其他計分項目，或直接以90%作為總分

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅意見，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方由week 3起將zoom meeting 全部轉為video and live learning，以及取消take attendance嘅做法。
理由一:
zoom meeting令到學生無法投入於課堂，上課氣氛十分尷尬，令到老師教學節奏減慢
例子: 同學在開cam或mic後感到極不自在，老師問問題後經常dead air，而老師亦不習慣如此教學模式。
理由二:
zoom meeting沒有錄影，同學無法重溫上堂嘅內容。當有lag或斷線嘅情況，同學需要要求老師重複內容，或直接miss咗。
理由三:
同學家中並沒有合適嘅環境以及設備上堂。受新型冠狀病毒的影響，同學大部分時間都在家中上課，但部份同學家中過於嘈吵，或有工程進行中，都大大影響上課時嘅進度。
理由四：
現在社會環境惡劣，因同學們有機會外出購買生活用品，例如口罩，廁紙等，未必不能夠在特定準時上課，再者online learning嘅目的在於flexible，因此校方應取消Take attendance嘅做法。
取代方案:
一、將所有zoom meeting改為live learning or video learning(包括使用Panopto)，讓同學能夠重溫課堂內容。
二、將zoom meeting改為不開cam，不開mic嘅形式，並要求老師錄製課堂內容。
三、取消Take attendance嘅分數，例如將10%平分於其他計分項目，或直接以90%作為總分

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅意見，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方改善zoom meeting的上課模式，以及取消網上點名嘅做法。

方案一：
要求教師們把課堂內容錄製成影片，並把強制開啟視像和麥克風改為非強制性，老師們需在教學期間把全部同學設至靜音，在答題期間或同學有發問時才解除靜音。

理由一：把課堂內容錄製成影片可讓同學重溫和複習，當遇上不明白的地方也可以重看，大大提升同學們的學習效率。
理由二：並不是每位同學都擁有合適的環境上課，雖則有虛擬背景和靜音兩個方法，但未能完全保護同學們的個人私隱。再者設至靜音能夠避免上課的時候不被打擾。

方案二：
取消網上點名的形式

理由一：由於社會環境的影響，同學們或會在原定的上課時間外出，例如購買生活用品，而取消點名的形式能夠令網上學習更為彈性。

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅建議，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

Given the current circumstances.. actually I don’t see any problems with using Zoom as a tool of online teaching. Instead, I think the problems that you mentioned are more about the insufficient training for the teaching staff and students to adapt to this new learning mode.

To be fair, we need to understand what this tool can do before we judge it is good or not. And I do appreciate that the TA in my department tried their best to prepare and conduct a few workshops to introduce Zoom to us.

For those issues you have mentioned, as I can see it seems those are not the problems with the tools, instead, it can be solved by communication. I suggest you to talk to your professors and explain why you may not be able to turn on the microphone and webcam.. I’m sure they will understand..

For me.. from a student’s perspective, I do hope that the lesson can keep the interaction to a certain extent, while I understand that some students may not be able to do so.. then they can just turn off their microphone and webcam .. just watch and treat it as a video lecture. (And Zoom does have the ‘record’ function. You can review the lesson anytime and anywhere you want.)

致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方由week 3起將zoom meeting 全部轉為video and live learning，以及取消take attendance嘅做法。
理由一:
zoom meeting令到學生無法投入於課堂，上課氣氛十分尷尬，令到老師教學節奏減慢
例子: 同學在開cam或mic後感到極不自在，老師問問題後經常dead air，而老師亦不習慣如此教學模式。
理由二:
zoom meeting沒有錄影，同學無法重溫上堂嘅內容。當有lag或斷線嘅情況，同學需要要求老師重複內容，或直接miss咗。
理由三:
同學家中並沒有合適嘅環境以及設備上堂。受新型冠狀病毒的影響，同學大部分時間都在家中上課，但部份同學家中過於嘈吵，或有工程進行中，都大大影響上課時嘅進度。
理由四：
現在社會環境惡劣，因同學們有機會外出購買生活用品，例如口罩，廁紙等，未必不能夠在特定準時上課，再者online learning嘅目的在於flexible，因此校方應取消Take attendance嘅做法。
取代方案:
一、將所有zoom meeting改為live learning or video learning(包括使用Panopto)，讓同學能夠重溫課堂內容。
二、將zoom meeting改為不開cam，不開mic嘅形式，並要求老師錄製課堂內容。
三、取消Take attendance嘅分數，例如將10%平分於其他計分項目，或直接以90%作為總分

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅意見，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

For me.. from a student’s perspective, I do hope that the lesson can keep the interaction to a certain extent, while I understand that some students may not be able to do so.. then they can just turn off their microphone and webcam .. just watch and treat it as a video lecture. ============================
致____大學:

我們為一眾___大學之大學學生, 現就____大學於_月_日起使用的Zoom Meeting 程式以及做法作出強烈的不滿和反對，現正要求校方改善zoom meeting的上課模式，以及取消網上點名嘅做法。

方案一：
要求教師們把課堂內容錄製成影片，並把強制開啟視像和麥克風改為非強制性，老師們需在教學期間把全部同學設至靜音，在答題期間或同學有發問時才解除靜音。

理由一：把課堂內容錄製成影片可讓同學重溫和複習，當遇上不明白的地方也可以重看，大大提升同學們的學習效率。
理由二：並不是每位同學都擁有合適的環境上課，雖則有虛擬背景和靜音兩個方法，但未能完全保護同學們的個人私隱。再者設至靜音能夠避免上課的時候不被打擾。

方案二：
取消網上點名的形式

理由一：由於社會環境的影響，同學們或會在原定的上課時間外出，例如購買生活用品，而取消點名的形式能夠令網上學習更為彈性。

請求校方務必採納同學們嘅建議，我們為求的只是提升同學的學習效率以及改善網上學習的質素。

一眾___大學學生、教職員及畢業生
